span.p: +cmd: contains the entry point of the application, such as main.go, which sets up the server and orchestrates the initialization of other layers.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 867px; text-align: center; width: 867px;

span.p: +interface: interface contains the code that adapts the input/output for different interfaces, such as HTTP, WebSocket, and CLI.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 755px; text-align: center; width: 755px;

span.p: +infra: infra contains the implementations of infrastructure concerns like databases, networking, and security.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 896px; text-align: center; width: 896px;

span.p: +domain: domain contains the core business logic. Each subdirectory(e.g., chat, user) : represents a different domain or subdomain.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 1244px; text-align: center; width: 1244px;

span.p: +usecase: usecase contains application-specific business rules, organized by feature or module(e.g., chat, user) : . Each use case corresponds to a specific application service or operation.
